pi_items.source: Verified via export_result.sh checking for $EXPORT_DIR/ergonomic_ui.png where EXPORT_DIR is /home/ga/DICOM/exports.
Verified via export_result.sh checking for $EXPORT_DIR/ui_settings.txt where EXPORT_DIR is /home/ga/DICOM/exports.
Verified via verifier.py which checks that prefs_font >= min_font_size (with default 16).

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the final screenshot to be saved at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ergonomic_ui.png and the text report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/ui_settings.txt. The minimum font size to be set is confirmed to be 16. The setup script generates a synthetic DICOM CT file named sample_ct.dcm if one does not already exist.
